title: Categorization of Software Projects
description: A hierarchical flowchart showing the primary ways to categorize software projects, branching out into common types and examples within each category.
elements: Project Size & Complexity (Simple, Medium, Complex, Very Complex)
Business Model (In-house, Contract, Open Source, Commercial)
Technology & Domain (Web, Mobile, Embedded, AI/ML, Data)
relationships: Primary categorization methods branch from a central 'Software Projects' node
Each primary category (e.g., 'Project Goal') is a parent node to its specific types (e.g., 'Product Development', 'Service Development')
Categories are distinct but can overlap in real-world projects (e.g., a large 'Contract' project for a 'Mobile' app)
